product: Genie products now use pay-as-you-go pricing ​
tagline: July 8, 2026 Starting July 8, 2026 at 00:00 UTC, Genie products, including [Genie Agents](/aws/en/genie/), [Genie Code](/aws/en/genie code/), and [Genie One](/aws/en/genie one/), are billed following
what_it_does: July 8, 2026 Starting July 8, 2026 at 00:00 UTC, Genie products, including [Genie Agents](/aws/en/genie/), [Genie Code](/aws/en/genie code/), and [Genie One](/aws/en/genie one/), are billed following a pay as you go pricing model that includes 150 DBUs of free large language model (LLM) usage every month, equivalent to about $10.50 in the US East region. Usage beyond the free amount is billed in DBUs, reflecting the underlying LLM models and agents that power each Genie session.
why_it_matters: To monitor and control Genie spend for your account, see [Manage budgets and cost controls for Genie](/aws/en/genie/budgets).
